criteria.label: Describe bagging and random feature subsets in your own words.
criteria.example: Write: 'Each tree trains on a bootstrap sample; at each split only sqrt(p) features are tried; final class is majority vote.'

criteria.label: Train a RandomForestClassifier and report OOB accuracy on a sklearn dataset.
criteria.example: On breast cancer data with n_estimators=200, oob_score=True, print oob_score_ rounded to 3 decimals.

criteria.label: Compare CV score mean and std for a single tree vs a random forest on the same data.
criteria.example: On 400×8 synthetic data, show forest std < tree std across 5 folds and state that lower std means lower variance.

criteria.label: Tune max_features and max_depth with cross-validation and justify choices.
criteria.example: GridSearchCV results table: best max_features='sqrt', max_depth=15, CV accuracy 0.91; note depth cap reduced leaf memorization on small bootstraps.
